texto: Ellie: "What was your favourite food before root beer floats were invented?"Will: "I dont know. Food was terrible before people started putting lots of chemicals and artifiacal flavours into it to make it taste better. I guess Ive always like carrots a lot."Ellie: "Carrots?" "Your other favourite food is carrots? What is wrong with you?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Countney Allison Moulton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sucesso. O trecho “Ellie: "What was your favourite food before root beer floats were invented?"Will: "I dont know. F…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, angels, wings-of-the-wicked pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de wings-of-the-wicked.
